---
name: Bug report
about: Record a repeatable break/fix issue for Codex, OpenClaw, or the handoff between them
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""

---

## Summary
What broke?

## Scope
- [ ] Codex
- [ ] OpenClaw
- [ ] Handoff / boundary
- [ ] Tailscale / network
- [ ] MSI host
- [ ] clinic-server
- [ ] Other

## Symptoms
List observable symptoms only.

## Source of truth used
Which docs, logs, or support-pack data were used?

## Steps already tried
What has already been attempted?

## Safest next steps
List lowest-risk steps first.

## Rollback / preservation
What should be backed up before risky changes?

## Durable record written?
Link the record under `records/` if one exists.
